intent: Write a community-sentiment deep dive on 'under-$20 tools every apartment renter should own' combining storefront picks with community consensus. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the home-kitchen and health-household categories and collect at least 5 products under $20 that qualify as tools (tape measure, basic toolkit, small flashlight, multipurpose knife, lint roller). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/personalfinance for posts on apartment must-haves. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) list the 5 storefront picks, (b) synthesize a community ranking, (c) show overlap and gaps, (d) close with a universal $100 kit. Cite every claim.
